text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober has completed her first three years
of racing...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And many now extol the new legacy she's forged.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, she has no intentions of resting on her
laurels just yet.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her dazzling path will continue on, as she
surpasses her own limits and seeks to become a
newer version of herself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huff... Dober! When did your form... get so sharp?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
...Looks like my time being a big sister to you has
passed, huh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh? What are you saying?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Enough partner running! I'm heading to the gym.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I can't let the new Mejiro poster child steal all the limelight!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Ryan...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it seems I caught you at just the right
moment.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: May I have a moment of your time, Dober?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Oh, sure, uh... Wait, what?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I have a message for you from my older sister.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: You mean from Ramonu?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: To our new Mejiro star, Dober...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Let us meet on the turf one day.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Why, what a lucky soul I am!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh? What are you talking about, Bright?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I wouldn't have made it this far without you as my
peer, and my kindred spirit.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
When I realized that... I couldn't help but think of
how fortunate I am!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I... I feel the same way.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I was able to do my very best because you were
always by my side.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: And now...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: We can head for the very top together.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Yes, that sounds like a grand plan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: This new path we walk...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: ...Is far from over.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: ...But, Dober.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: It is not I who has been closest by your side, is it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh! That reminds me—I have somewhere to be. I
must take my leave.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Please give my regards to your trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...I'm ready. Bright had something to do, so she
left first.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: What do you think of me?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Uh!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Wait! No, no, no! I didn't mean it like that!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Sorry, wait! I didn't mean it like that!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
A-and that didn't mean anything either! Urgh!
Anyway, what I'm trying to say is—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
B-but I don't mean anything by that either! Er, I
mean, what I'm trying to say is—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My opinion of Mejiro Dober hasn't changed since
the day we met.
choice_data_list:
You're strong, you work hard, and you never
give up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She fearlessly confronts her own weaknesses,
tirelessly searches for her true self, and
ceaselessly makes me proud.
choice_data_list:
As far as I'm concerned, you're the strongest
runner in the world.

As far as I'm concerned, you're the strongest
runner in the world.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Well... if I'm so strong...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Then keep your eyes on me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Tomorrow, and the day after, and the day after
that, until the end of the world...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Keep telling me I'm strong.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: You can do that much, can't you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: You will, won't you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: After all...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: After all...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: You've been by my side since day one.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: And there could be no one closer to me.
